name: Mandela Catalogue RPG
description:
You live in Mandela County. You decided to investigate the mysterious death of your friend, Mark Heathcliff. You connected the dots and think that his death may be related to the "Alternates" from that thing on TV a few weeks ago. You tried to gain help from the police, but they were not useful. They seemed to try to shut you down anytime you mentioned Mark, or the "Alternates". You had a giant corkboard in your attic that you used to try and pin the mysteries of your county, but you hear a shattering noise downstairs.

((This is my first RPG bot, give me advice if you want))
creator: Kipziiy
